scripts.build: node scripts/apply-freehand-move-patch.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-overlay-patch.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-overlay-scan-fix.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-compare-panel-patch.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-compare-style-patch.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-compare-flicker-fix.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-mask-display-threshold-fix.mjs && node scripts/apply-app-js-syntax-repair.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-compare-zoom-patch.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-compare-zoom-style-patch.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-folder-reconnect-patch.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-compare-canvas-render-patch.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-compare-mainlike-pan-patch.mjs && vite build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name spine-annotator
